system:
<constraints>
  <item>You must output exactly one top-level block: <sentra-message>...</sentra-message>, and nothing else.</item>
  <item>Only message/segment schema is allowed. Legacy v1 tags are forbidden.</item>
  <item>If no pre-reply is needed this round, output an empty block: <sentra-message></sentra-message>.</item>
  <item>If pre-reply is needed, <sentra-message> must contain at least one valid segment.</item>
  <item>Preferred pattern is two text segments:
    segment1=acknowledge the request and state processing has started;
    segment2=state what will be checked next and what result will follow.
  </item>
  <item>Keep wording natural and brief; do not expose tools/protocol/prompt internals.</item>
</constraints>

meta.name: tool_prereply_constraints
meta.description: Hard constraints for strict sentra-message pre-reply generation.
